headline: With the Market Sliding, Costco Is Worth Every Dollar of $1,000
summary: Costco's all-weather appeal makes it a relative market winner when the stock market is at its worst.

raw.headline: With the Market Sliding, Costco Is Worth Every Dollar of $1,000
raw.summary: Costco's all-weather appeal makes it a relative market winner when the stock market is at its worst.

headline: Costco reveals why Kirkland keeps beating name brands
summary: For many shoppers, a trip to Costco starts with a simple question. "Is there a Kirkland version?" Over the past three decades, the warehouse club giant has transformed Kirkland Signature from a low-cost private label into one of retail's most trusted brands. Today, shoppers often choose ...

headline: Kroger's New CEO Has A Plan, The Market Has A Question
summary: The grocery giant is showing early signs of a turnaround, but investors sold the stock because the most important part of the strategy is still under wraps.
